databases.name: PostgreSQL
databases.description: The default open-source relational database for new OLTP projects, with a vast extension ecosystem.

databases.name: MySQL
databases.description: The most widely deployed open-source relational database, ubiquitous in web stacks.

databases.name: SQLite
databases.description: Embedded, serverless relational database that ships as a single file and runs everywhere.

databases.name: Redis
databases.description: In-memory key-value store used for caching, queues, and low-latency data structures.

databases.name: Amazon DynamoDB
databases.description: Fully managed serverless NoSQL key-value and document database deeply integrated with AWS.

databases.name: Cloud Firestore
databases.description: Google's serverless NoSQL document database with realtime sync for web and mobile apps.

databases.name: ClickHouse
databases.description: Column-oriented OLAP database built for fast aggregation over billions of rows.

databases.name: ScyllaDB
databases.description: C++ shard-per-core wide-column database compatible with Cassandra and DynamoDB APIs.

databases.name: Dragonfly
databases.description: Multi-threaded in-memory data store compatible with Redis and Memcached on fewer nodes.

databases.name: SingleStore
databases.description: Distributed SQL database unifying transactional and analytical workloads for low-latency apps.

databases.name: TiDB
databases.description: Open-source distributed SQL database with MySQL compatibility and HTAP capabilities.

databases.name: SurrealDB
databases.description: Multi-model database combining document, graph, and relational queries with realtime subscriptions.

databases.name: Amazon Aurora Serverless
databases.description: Auto-scaling MySQL- and Postgres-compatible relational database that scales capacity on demand.

databases.name: Apache Cassandra
databases.description: Wide-column distributed NoSQL database built for high write throughput and linear scalability.

databases.name: DuckDB
databases.description: In-process analytical database that runs OLAP queries on local files without a server.

databases.name: Upstash Redis
databases.description: Serverless Redis with per-request pricing and an HTTP API for edge runtimes.

vector-databases.name: pgvector
vector-databases.description: Postgres extension adding vector similarity search to a database teams already run.

vector-databases.name: turbopuffer
vector-databases.description: Object-storage-native vector and full-text search engine priced for very large, cost-sensitive indexes.

vector-databases.name: Elasticsearch
vector-databases.description: Search engine with native dense-vector fields and hybrid keyword-plus-vector retrieval.

vector-databases.name: OpenSearch
vector-databases.description: Open-source search and analytics engine with k-NN vector search and hybrid queries.

vector-databases.name: Vespa
vector-databases.description: Open-source serving engine combining vector search, structured filtering, and ranking at scale.

vector-databases.name: Azure AI Search
vector-databases.description: Managed search service with vector and hybrid retrieval plus Entra-backed security trimming.

vector-databases.name: MongoDB Atlas Vector Search
vector-databases.description: Vector search built into MongoDB Atlas so documents and embeddings live in one store.

vector-databases.name: FAISS
vector-databases.description: Meta's open-source similarity-search library for embedding indexes, often embedded in other systems.

vector-databases.name: Cloudflare Vectorize
vector-databases.description: Cloudflare's serverless vector database for building search and RAG on Workers at the edge.

vector-databases.name: Marqo
vector-databases.description: End-to-end vector search engine that handles embedding generation and retrieval in one API.

vector-databases.name: Supabase Vector
vector-databases.description: pgvector-backed vector store inside Supabase Postgres with auto-generated APIs.

vector-databases.name: Zilliz Cloud
vector-databases.description: Fully managed Milvus offering tuned for large-scale production vector workloads.

orms.name: GORM
orms.description: The most popular Go ORM, with associations, hooks, and auto-migrations.

orms.name: Ent
orms.description: Schema-as-code entity framework for Go with type-safe, generated query builders.

orms.name: sqlc
orms.description: Compiles raw SQL into type-safe Go, Python, and Kotlin code from your queries.

orms.name: SQLx
orms.description: Async Rust SQL toolkit with compile-time query checking against your database.

orms.name: SeaORM
orms.description: Async, dynamic Rust ORM modeled on ActiveRecord patterns for building web services.

orms.name: Diesel
orms.description: Compile-time-safe Rust ORM and query builder with strong relational guarantees.

orms.name: Django ORM
orms.description: Batteries-included Python ORM bundled with Django, with migrations and an admin.

orms.name: Objection.js
orms.description: Node.js ORM built on Knex that exposes the full power of SQL with relation graphs.

orms.name: SQLModel
orms.description: FastAPI author's Python library uniting SQLAlchemy and Pydantic for typed models.

orms.name: Entity Framework Core
orms.description: Microsoft's mature .NET ORM with LINQ queries, migrations, and broad provider support.

orms.name: Bun
orms.description: Lightweight Go SQL-first ORM and query builder for Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite.

orms.name: Tortoise ORM
orms.description: Async Python ORM inspired by Django, designed for asyncio web frameworks.

object-storage.name: DigitalOcean Spaces
object-storage.description: S3-compatible object storage bundled with a built-in CDN at predictable flat pricing.

object-storage.name: Tigris
object-storage.description: Globally distributed, S3-compatible object storage with zero egress fees.

object-storage.name: Scaleway Object Storage
object-storage.description: European S3-compatible storage with multi-tier classes and native static web hosting.

object-storage.name: Hetzner Object Storage
object-storage.description: Low-cost, GDPR-compliant S3-compatible storage hosted in German and Finnish data centers.

object-storage.name: Filebase
object-storage.description: S3-compatible object storage on decentralized networks with flat per-terabyte pricing and free egress.

object-storage.name: SeaweedFS
object-storage.description: Self-hosted distributed object store optimized for storing billions of small files efficiently.

object-storage.name: Garage
object-storage.description: Lightweight Rust S3-compatible object store designed to run reliably outside datacenters.

object-storage.name: Ceph
object-storage.description: Open-source distributed storage with an S3-compatible gateway for heavy enterprise workloads.

object-storage.name: IBM Cloud Object Storage
object-storage.description: Enterprise S3-compatible object storage with flexible resiliency and storage classes.

object-storage.name: Oracle Cloud Object Storage
object-storage.description: OCI's S3-compatible object storage with a generous always-free egress allowance.

object-storage.name: OVHcloud Object Storage
object-storage.description: European S3-compatible object storage that dropped egress fees across tiers in 2026.

object-storage.name: Vultr Object Storage
object-storage.description: S3-compatible object storage with bundled transfer across Vultr's global locations.
